dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3735 IS: Prohibit Partisan Park Passes Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Merkley (for himself, Mr. Van Hollen, Mr. Padilla, Ms. Blunt Rochester, Mr. Schiff, Mr. Wyden, Mr. Bennet, and Mr. Booker) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Lands Recreation Enhancement Act to prohibit the use of the image of living political figures on the America the Beautiful—the National Parks and Federal Recreational Lands Pass.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Prohibit Partisan Park Passes Act.

section.header: Restriction on use of images for the America the Beautiful—the National Parks and Federal Recreational Lands Pass
section.text: Section 805(a)(2) of the Federal Lands Recreation Enhancement Act (16 U.S.C. 6804(a)(2)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the paragraph heading, by striking competition; and

by adding at the end the following: The image used on the National Parks and Federal Recreational Lands Pass may not include a living current or former elected official or other living political figure..
